notes: Dockerfile/entrypoint refactor task. instruction.md is a detailed multi-phase plan. test.sh is a custom structural verifier scoring 5 weighted F2P gates (apt consolidation, npm pinning, mcp jq, marketplace build-time, lazy use-agents) — appropriate for this kind of refactor where there are no behavioral unit tests. P2P_REGRESSION gates are explicitly informational only (per CLAUDE.md). Reward formula uses correct weighted-replace shape. test_cmd is 'true' because all logic lives in the embedded Python — install_config has a clear _note explaining this. Coherent.
